finding: The atomic deployment evidence finalizer previously required hostname-authority and deployment-metadata files that are intentionally not generated when access or deployment is blocked, preventing a complete blocked-run manifest.

improvement.behavior: Materialize explicit unavailable records only for missing conditional evidence; preserve real evidence byte-for-byte; continue failing closed for all other missing required evidence.
improvement.acceptance_boundary: Unavailable records explicitly state that they must not support deployment acceptance.

verification.source_inspection: Finalizer imports and invokes the conditional-evidence materializer before manifest construction.
verification.evidence_strength: committed source and deterministic test contract; runtime execution pending

privacy: No credentials, secret values, health information, or private chat material are recorded.
limits: Does not prove Cloudflare credentials are configured.
Does not prove a Pages hostname resolves.
Does not prove a deployment occurred.
Does not weaken acceptance requirements for successful deployment evidence.
